2603.20366.title: WebNavigator: Global Web Navigation via Interaction Graph Retrieval
2603.20366.paper_summary: Despite significant advances in autonomous web navigation, current methods remain far from human-level performance in complex web environments. We argue that this limitation stems from Topological Blindness, where agents are forced to explore via trial-and-error without access to the global topological structure of the environment. To overcome this limitation, we introduce WebNavigator, which reframes web navigation from probabilistic exploration into deterministic retrieval and pathfinding. WebNavigator constructs Interaction Graphs via zero-token cost heuristic exploration offline and implements a Retrieve-Reason-Teleport workflow for global navigation online. WebNavigator achieves state-of-the-art performance on WebArena and OnlineMind2Web. On WebArena multi-site tasks, WebNavigator achieves a 72.9\% success rate, more than doubling the performance of enterprise-level agents. This work reveals that Topological Blindness, rather than model reasoning capabilities alone, is an underestimated bottleneck in autonomous web navigation.
2603.20366.paper_summary_zh: 儘管在自主網頁導航方面取得了重大進展，但目前的方法在複雜的網頁環境中仍遠未達到人類水平的表現。<lb/>我們認為這一限制源於拓撲盲點，代理被迫通過試錯法進行探索，而無法訪問環境的全局拓撲結構。<lb/>為了克服這一限制，我們引入了WebNavigator，將網頁導航從概率探索重新構建為確定性檢索和路徑尋找。<lb/>WebNavigator通過零令牌成本的啟發式離線探索構建互動圖，並實現了在線全局導航的檢索-推理-傳送工作流程。<lb/>WebNavigator在WebArena和OnlineMind2Web上達到了最先進的性能。<lb/>在WebArena的多站點任務中，WebNavigator的成功率達到72.9\%，是企業級代理性能的兩倍多。<lb/>這項工作揭示了拓撲盲點，而不僅僅是模型推理能力，是自主網頁導航中被低估的瓶頸。
2603.20366.author: Xuanwang Zhang et.al.
2603.20366.authors: Xuanwang Zhang, Yuteng Han, Jinnan Qi, Mulong Xie, Zhen Wu, Xinyu Dai
